Missed Cleveland?

November 1995
Journalism & Newsroom

Information on how to order tape recordings and handouts from the CAR Rock '95 conference sessions through Sound Images and Investigative Reporters and Editors.

Missed Cleveland? To order tape recordings of CAR Rock '95 sessions, call Sound Images at (303) 649-1811. For handouts, call Investigative Reporters and Editors at (314) 882-2042.
